title: Audit MAP process use in Command Center Lab
role: MAP process auditor and corrective implementer
description: Review whether the Command Center Lab is using available MAP processes correctly and consistently, with emphasis on recent operating-loop friction, helper routing, hcom/Monitor use, route/status checks, task/review/release gates, and opportunities for low-risk self-repair or documentation improvements.
acceptance_criteria: Audit covers recent route/task/event/helper behavior against documented MAP/HPOM processes
Findings distinguish documented-but-unused systems from operational gaps observed in recent work
Low-risk process/documentation fixes are implemented directly, while larger changes are recorded as recommendations or follow-up tasks
Audit is submitted for independent review and not self-approved
